name: Tonkor
description: Hurl mayhem and destruction with this Grineer grenade launcher.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Hurl mayhem and destruction with this Grineer grenade launcher.

components.name: Cryotic
components.description:
Usually found in extreme sub-zero environments, Cryotic instantly freezes anything it contacts.

Location: Excavation Missions on Venus, Earth, Phobos, Europa, and Neptune

components.name: Oxium
components.description:
Oxium is a rare lighter than air alloy of Orokin origin, used in certain Corpus Robotics.

Location: Venus, Jupiter, Mars, Neptune, Pluto, Eris, Europa, and Lua.

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the flare size of the Kuva Tonkor’s explosion.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tonkor grenade remaining in-hand if you roll when reloading.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Tonkor
Kuva Tonkor
Kuva Tonkor: From 60 to 11

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.fixes: Tonkor

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.5 + 29.5.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Tonkor requiring an Orokin Catalyst instead of an Exilus Adapter to unlock the Exilus slot.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.13
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Tonkor projectiles colliding with themselves when Multishot is used, causing them to instantly stagger players when fired during certain movements

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: TennoGen 27.3.8 + 27.3.8.1 + 27.3.8.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Kuva Tonkor and Phantasma requiring an Orokin Catalyst to unlock its Exilus Slot instead of an Exilus Adapter.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
This retroactively fixes the Kuva weapons that lost out on their innate bonus damage by giving them back their random buff. Unfortunately, the Kuva Lich name can’t be easily associated with the Kuva weapon, so these fixed weapons will have the default Kuva weapon name (Kuva Tonkor, Kuva Bramma, etc). 
Why: Several players brought up the history of the Tonkor and we want to make sure we ship this change in a place that’s conservative in its starting point from a balance perspective. The complete removal of Self Damage does change the pace of destruction with some of the game’s most powerful weapons, so we want to make sure we can iterate upwardly instead of releasing a bonanza of explosions with no other choices.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a delay in Tonkor’s grenade explosion that occurred when the grenade passed through Volt’s Shield.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.7 + 24.2.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mirage’s Hall of Mirror clones not firing Tonkor grenades.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Mesa Prime - Hotfix 24.2.2
patchlogs.changes: Tonkor Reload Speed increased from 2 seconds to 1.7 seconds

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: The Profit-Taker - Update 24.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the projectiles travel distance that was affecting weapons like the Tonkor that require its bullet to travel a certain distance before they become "armed".

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed seeing squad mates’ Tonkor aim trail when shooting or aiming.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.8
patchlogs.changes: In order to maintain performance we have tweaked the max number of Tonkor projectiles Limbo can create in Stasis to 25 and the max number of Staticor projectiles to 10 before Stasis becomes unstable and closes.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.6
patchlogs.changes: Tonkor's projectile will now start with no lens flare visible and activate when Arming Distance is reached.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes:
The Tonkor's rocket jumping mechanic has long been obsolete since the introduction of bullet jumping, so the Tonkor now deals self-damage like all other launchers.
The Tonkor Grenade trajectory line now appears on holding the fire button (Default Left Mouse), and grenade fires on release.
The Accuracy of the Tonkor has been increased.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.11.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tonkor's iron sights not being flipped up when first loading into a mission.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed unintentional DOT from Adhesive Blast on the Ogris, Penta, Secura Penta, and Tonkor.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 19.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Adhesive Blast causing the Zarr, Penta, Tonkor, Torid, Secura Penta, and Ogris’ projectile sound to not play.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U4+4.1
patchlogs.changes: The new Nightwatch Skin Pack will include skins for: Grinlok, Tonkor, Marelok, Brakk, Diriga, Dual Cleavers, Machete and Jat Kittag. Find them in the Market today!

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove
patchlogs.changes:
Tonkor damage increased in Conclave
Tonkor self damage enabled in Conclave

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.changes: Weapon skins for the Grinlok, Tonkor, Jat Kittag and Marelok are now available from Teshin!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.12.2
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed not being able to bounce off of Tonkor’s explosions as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/649299-tonkor-isnt-allowing-grenade-jumping-as-of-18121/

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Increased the damage of the Tonkor in Conclave.
Increased the ammo pool of the Tonkor in Conclave.
Tonkor projectile now has a max of two bounces before exploding on next impact in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.1.3
patchlogs.changes: Increased damage and ammo pool of Tonkor in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.changes: Increased blast radius of Penta series and Tonkor in PvP

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue causing players to be stuck in iron sights with the Tonkor when firing immediately after a quick melee.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.8.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Tonkor grenades bouncing off Boss weak points.
Fixed Tonkor’s iron sights not closing when quick meleeing.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tonkor’s projectile preview arc appearing underneath other effects.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.4.5 + 16.4.5.1 + 16.4.5.2
patchlogs.changes: The Tonkor can no longer bounce other players.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Tonkor being able to damage and kill teammates.
Fixed the Tonkor and Penta not being affected by Volt’s Electric Shield as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/446728-tonkor-does-not-seem-to-be-affected-by-electric-shield/
Fixed the Tonkor not properly knocking the user in the air when impacting an area close to a nearby enemy target.
Fixed Tonkor grenades not exploding on contact with ragdolled enemies.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.4.3 + Credit Reimbursement #2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Terminal Velocity Mod not being equippable on the Tonkor as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/446419-terminal-velocity-unequipable-for-tonkor/
Fixed Mirage’s Clones being able to hit Mirage with Tonkor shots.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.4
patchlogs.fixes:
Tonkor Grenade Launcher available now!
Hurl mayhem and destruction at the enemy with the Tonkor! Grenades from this Grineer launcher explode on impact. Use their blasts to propel yourself to new heights!
